title: Combine Groups from multiple projects

posts.author: Bman (Bman)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have multiple boards with different projects and all have a buy group with things I need to purchase.
I would like to create a separate board that has all the buy groups listed/combined and dynamically updates so if I mark something as ordered on the main group it marks it as ordered in the project group.
